node.statement: (Compton scattering example) For γ+e⁻ → γ+e⁻ in helicity basis |J, λ_γ, λ_e⟩ with J ≤ J_max, helicity conservation block-diagonalises the Choi matrix. The inclusive channel (trace out photon, detect electron spin) satisfies the BP Kraus rank bound. SDP verification confirms for J_max = 1,...,4.
